name: roi-platform
description: ROI monorepo: API + admin + POS + kitchen display

scripts.dev:all: pnpm run build:shared && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=350 pnpm -r --parallel --filter @roi/api --filter @roi/admin-web --filter @roi/pos-web --filter @roi/kitchen-display --filter @roi/qr-web dev
scripts.build:shared: pnpm --filter @roi/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @roi/shared-utils build && pnpm --filter @roi/api-client build
scripts.build:frontends: pnpm --filter @roi/admin-web build && pnpm --filter @roi/pos-web build && pnpm --filter @roi/kitchen-display build && pnpm --filter @roi/qr-web build
